label: CMake: Configure (Zed)
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/Microsoft.VisualStudio.DevShell.dll'; Enter-VsDevShell -VsInstallPath 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch amd64 -HostArch amd64; cmake --preset zed-debug"

label: CMake: Build (Zed)
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/Microsoft.VisualStudio.DevShell.dll'; Enter-VsDevShell -VsInstallPath 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch amd64 -HostArch amd64; cmake --build --preset zed-debug"
